subject: fix(theme): eliminate all hardcoded text-white, rgba overlays, and debug colors
body:
Replace every remaining hardcoded color with theme-aware equivalents.

BubbleContent.tsx (own message bubble):
- text-white → colors.neutralContent (adapts to all theme combos)
- text-white/70, text-white/60 → withAlpha(colors.neutralContent, 0.7/0.6)
- rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3) tone tag bg → withAlpha(colors.neutral, 0.4)
- text-white on received tone labels → colors.neutralContent

ComposeBar.tsx:
- text-white on send button → colors.neutralContent

ChatPanel.tsx, chat/[id].tsx:
- text-white on avatar initials → text-neutral-content

PWADebugBanner.tsx:
- Hardcoded #ff6b6b/#ffd93d/#51cf66 → colors.error/warning/success
- Hardcoded source colors → colors.info/secondary/warning/success/accent
- Action button colors (Re-run/Clear/Copy/Close) → theme tokens

CLAUDE.md:
- Updated tone tag styling docs to reflect neutralContent + withAlpha(neutral)

Tags: theme, cleanup, code-quality, consistency
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: theme-system
Semver: patch
